ci_evidence.consumer: Node v201 real-read window CI artifact manifest verification
ci_evidence.node_action: verify manifest path hints before CI artifact upload dry-run

artifact_retention.consumer: Node v203 cross-project CI artifact retention gate
artifact_retention.node_action: verify retention days and artifact path before cross-project retention gate

binary_provenance.consumer: Node v208 managed audit persistence boundary candidate
binary_provenance.runtime_binary_hint: cmake-build-v89/minikv_server and cmake-build-v89/minikv_client from the current CMake build
binary_provenance.node_action: verify binary, fixture, and release evidence path alignment before managed audit persistence boundary work

retention_provenance_check.consumer: Node v211 managed audit identity approval provenance dry-run packet
retention_provenance_check.node_action: verify runtime evidence retention and binary provenance alignment before managed audit dry-run packet work

retention_provenance_replay_marker.consumer: Node v213 managed audit packet restore drill plan
retention_provenance_replay_marker.consumed_by: Node v211 managed audit identity approval provenance dry-run packet
retention_provenance_replay_marker.node_action: verify v84 retention provenance consumption before managed audit packet restore drill planning

managed_audit_adapter_restore_boundary_r.consumer: Node v215 managed audit dry-run adapter candidate
managed_audit_adapter_restore_boundary_r.consumed_by: Node v213 managed audit packet restore drill plan
managed_audit_adapter_restore_boundary_r.boundary: mini-kv remains a read-only evidence provider for managed audit adapter preparation
managed_audit_adapter_restore_boundary_r.node_action: verify mini-kv restore/write boundary before managed audit dry-run adapter candidate work

managed_audit_adapter_non_authoritative_.consumer: Node v217 managed audit adapter production-hardening readiness gate
managed_audit_adapter_non_authoritative_.consumed_by: Node v215 managed audit dry-run adapter candidate
managed_audit_adapter_non_authoritative_.boundary: mini-kv is non-authoritative read-only storage evidence, not the managed audit store
managed_audit_adapter_non_authoritative_.node_action: verify mini-kv storage is non-authoritative before managed audit adapter production-hardening readiness gate

command_dispatch_quality_receipt.consumer: Node v219 managed audit adapter implementation precheck packet
command_dispatch_quality_receipt.consumed_by: Node v217 managed audit adapter production-hardening readiness gate
command_dispatch_quality_receipt.boundary: command dispatch quality receipt only; no write, admin, WAL, snapshot, restore, or managed audit storage behavior change
command_dispatch_quality_receipt.node_action: verify mini-kv command dispatch read-only quality before managed audit adapter implementation precheck

adapter_shell_non_storage_guard_receipt.consumer: Node v221 managed audit local adapter candidate dry-run
adapter_shell_non_storage_guard_receipt.consumed_by: Node v220 managed audit adapter interface and disabled shell
adapter_shell_non_storage_guard_receipt.boundary: adapter shell non-storage guard receipt only; mini-kv remains runtime evidence and is not a managed audit adapter storage backend
adapter_shell_non_storage_guard_receipt.node_action: verify mini-kv is not the adapter shell storage backend before local adapter candidate dry-run
